segments.text: Now as we slowly see the KO threshold...
segments.original_text: さあじわりじわりと撃墜ラインが

segments.text: ...the line to KO is becoming clearer and clearer
segments.original_text: 撃墜までのラインがどんどん見えていくというところ

full_text: Now as we slowly see the KO threshold... ...the line to KO is becoming clearer and clearer Up B!
